# Third-Party Dependencies

## Catch2
- **Version:** 3.4.0 (amalgamated)
- **Source:** https://github.com/catchorg/Catch2
- **License:** BSL-1.0 (Boost Software License 1.0)
- **Purpose:** Unit testing framework
- **Files:**
  - `catch_amalgamated.hpp` — header (all public APIs)
  - `catch_amalgamated.cpp` — implementation
- **Update:** Replace both files from [Catch2 releases](https://github.com/catchorg/Catch2/releases)
- **CMake:** See `CMakeLists.txt` `catch2` target for integration details
